title: ZOHAN 042 Radio Ear Defenders, FM Safety Ear Protector Muffs, Garden Digital Hearing Protection, AM Noise Reduction Bonus Sturdy Leather Storage Bag, Ideal for Workshop, Mowing, Construction - Yellow
features: Europe Standard Radio Ear Defenders: AM Frequency Range: 522KHZ-1629KHZ, Step frequency: 9KHz -- FM Range: 87.5MHZ-108MHZ -- SNR 30dB, NRR 25dB --Digital AM/FM tuning with LCD display -- Store up to 10 AM and 10 FM stations in memory. Besides, auto-scanning helps you quickly find and save your favorite stations

Why do you need it: Hearing is the most important thing in communication, but more and more people in the UK have hearing issues -- However, hearing is the most easily overlooked by people in security protection-- Once the hearing is impaired, it cannot be easily recovered. Preventive protection is the priority --What's more, ZOHAN 042 is not just a ear protector, also a headset for enjoying music and broadcasting

Feature: Sufficient max volume and excellent stereo bass sound quality, ZOHAN 042 Radio Headset can effectively cover the surrounding noise when you listen to music--Soft padded headband filled with foam, Reduce stress around the head--Adjustable headband, one size fits most people--Comes with a black leather bag, easy to carry

Occasions: Reduce saws, woodworking, lawn mowers and other Industrial environment noise --Ideal for working, gardening, construction, flights and holiday --Enjoy music - Connect to MP3 players, mobile phones and other audio playing device (cable included)--Powered by 2 AA batteries, NOT INCLUDED
Suggests: Replaceable ear cushions design, please clean or change ear pads 1-2 months a time for better experience--Instruction manual is very important, please do refer it when first use
description: Product Description FUNCTIONS *1.Signal Number Rating (SNR) of 30(dB) to protect your hearing *2.Built-in with switch key and volume adjusting key to get ideal volume *3.Built-in antenna with high reception sensitivity *4.Preset 20 different channels(10 AM & 10 FM, total 20) *5.Frequency range from 87.5-108MHz in FM and 522-1712KHz in AM ( Tunes in increments of 9 ) Package Include 1 pcs ZOHAN 042 Ear Defenders with Radio 1 pcs 3.5mm standard stereo jack connecting cable 1 pcs user manual Where can it be used? Why Choose ZOHAN 042 Radio Ear Defenders？ Easy to Operate 1.Digital LCD DISPLAY 2.MEMORY BUTTON - add your favorite channel to your presets 3&4.TUNING BUTTON - choose what you want 5.POWER BUTTON 6.VOLUME CONTROL KNOB - manage your volume by yourself Adjustable headband The metal frame of the headphones is extendable . You can easily adjust the length of the headband to make the ear muffs perfectly sealed and maximize the noise attenuation. Audio Input Jack Features a 3.5mm AUX Jack and an audio cable, If you want to listen to music, Simply plug the ear defenders into any audio devices, such as a smartphone, MP3/MP4 player, PC, Laptop, etc Not Only Ear Protection With adequate volume, ZOHAN EM042 radio headphone allows you to enjoy the program while reduce more noise, perfect for mowing on a tractor and other noisy environments. Better Wearing Experience Unlike the other brand, ZOHAN 042 radio ear protector feature soft, anti-sweat and snug fit design foam ear pads which provide better wearing experience and noise isolation. Besides, Snap-in design make them easy maintenance. Battery Compartment The battery cover is a detachable design, it would be easier to install or replace batteries than other brands. Powered by 2AA Alkaline Batteries - NOT included.
